name: escape-the-dungeon
description: Greenfield: agent builds the game from scratch using the full GAD framework

dimensions.label: Playability
dimensions.description: Does the game run end-to-end? Title → new game → rooms → combat → return → continue. No softlocks. Inputs responsive.

dimensions.label: UI polish
dimensions.description: Does the UI feel intentional? Icons, HP/mana bars, room-type visual differentiation, styled controls. Not raw ASCII or debug panels.

dimensions.label: Mechanics implementation
dimensions.description: Are the declared mechanics (combat, forge, rune crafting, resistances) functional and coherent? Do they match the design doc?

dimensions.label: Ingenuity requirement met
dimensions.description: v4 core principle: do starter abilities ACTUALLY feel insufficient? Does the forge produce spells that feel necessary rather than cosmetic? If you can reach floor 2 without crafting, the gate failed.

dimensions.label: Stability
dimensions.description: Does the game crash? Do scene transitions leave stale state? Does save/load work? Can you finish a run start-to-end without reload?
